common.loading_note: It takes a little longer the first time
common.no_description: No description available for this metric.

sidebar.ahp_description: Defining weights manually can be subjective and inconsistent. The Analytic Hierarchy Process uses pairwise comparisons to mathematically derive optimal weights while measuring your decision consistency.

impt_entropy.label: IMPT with entropy
impt_entropy.description: Composite index using entropy, which gives more weight to variables that show the most contrast

impt_geom.label: IMPT with geometric mean
impt_geom.description: Composite index using geometric mean, which penalizes low scores in any dimension, ensuring that a single low score significantly drags down the entire result

impt_equal.label: IMPT with equal weights
impt_equal.description: Composite index considering equal weights for each dimension

impt_dynamic.label: IMPT dynamic (custom weights)
impt_dynamic.description: Computed on the fly based on user weightings of dimensions

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Aggregated accessibility metric, measuring access to key services and opportunities

mobility.label: Mobility
mobility.description: Aggregated mobility metric, considering commuting and mobility infrastructure

affordability.label: Affordability
affordability.description: Aggregated affordability metric, considering income and housing costs

census_landuse_youth_ratio.label: Youth ratio
census_landuse_youth_ratio.description: Proportion of population under 15 years old

census_landuse_elderly_ratio.label: Elderly ratio
census_landuse_elderly_ratio.description: Proportion of population over 65 years old

census_landuse_women_percentage.label: Women percentage
census_landuse_women_percentage.description: Percentage of women in the population

mobility_infrastructure_cycleway_to_road.label: Cycling infrastructure ratio
mobility_infrastructure_cycleway_to_road.description: Ratio of cycling infrastructure to road length

mobility_infrastructure_pedpath_to_road_.label: Pedestrian infrastructure ratio
mobility_infrastructure_pedpath_to_road_.description: Ratio of pedestrian paths to road length

census_landuse_buildings_pre1945_percent.label: Buildings pre-1945 (%)
census_landuse_buildings_pre1945_percent.description: Percentage of buildings built before 1945 (without car garage)

safety_inner_total_acidentes.label: Total accidents
safety_inner_total_acidentes.description: Total number of recorded road accidents (2019-2023)

safety_inner_total_veiculos.label: Total involved vehicles
safety_inner_total_veiculos.description: Total number of vehicles involved in road accidents

affordability_total_money.label: Cost of Commuting
affordability_total_money.description: Estimated expenditure on commuting per trip

modal_census_share.label: Modal share (Commuting)
modal_census_share.description: Modal share based on Census data for standard commuting trips

census_income_income_hh.label: Household income
census_income_income_hh.description: Average yearly net income per household

census_income_gini_coef.label: Gini coefficient
census_income_gini_coef.description: Measure of inequality in income distribution

census_income_housing_costs.label: Housing costs
census_income_housing_costs.description: Average monthly expenditure on housing (rent or mortgage)

mobility_commuting_avg_tt.label: Average commuting time
mobility_commuting_avg_tt.description: Average travel time for commuting trips (home-work/school)

mobility_cost.label: Average access time to services
mobility_cost.description: Travel time to the nearest facilities by chosen transport mode

mobility_cost_health_n1_residents.label: Health Access
mobility_cost_health_n1_residents.description: Travel time to the nearest health facility: hospital or health center

mobility_cost_schools_primary_n1_kids.label: Primary School Access
mobility_cost_schools_primary_n1_kids.description: Travel time to the nearest primary school

mobility_cost_greenspaces_n1_residents.label: Green Space Access
mobility_cost_greenspaces_n1_residents.description: Travel time to the nearest green space

mobility_cost_recreation_n3_residents.label: Recreation Access
mobility_cost_recreation_n3_residents.description: Average travel time to the nearest recreation spots

mobility_cost_groceries_n3_residents.label: Grocery Access
mobility_cost_groceries_n3_residents.description: Average travel time to the nearest grocery stores

mobility_shared_mobility_points.label: Shared Mobility Points
mobility_shared_mobility_points.description: Number of shared mobility service points in the area

mobility_stop_coverage_ratio_served_popu.label: PT Stop Coverage
mobility_stop_coverage_ratio_served_popu.description: Proportion of the population with 500m access to public transport stops

access_gap_money_cost_gap.label: Affordability Gap (Cost)
access_gap_money_cost_gap.description: Cost difference between travel cost for PT and Car. Positive values indicate PT is more expensive than Car

access_gap_money_relative_gap_cost.label: Affordability Gap (Relative Cost)
access_gap_money_relative_gap_cost.description: Relative cost difference between travel cost for PT and Car. Positive values indicate PT is x times more expensive than Car

access_gap_time_accessibility_gap.label: Accessibility Gap (Time)
access_gap_time_accessibility_gap.description: Time difference between travel time for Car and PT. Positive values indicate Car is faster than PT

access_gap_time_relative_gap_time.label: Accessibility Gap (Relative Time)
access_gap_time_relative_gap_time.description: Relative time difference between travel time for Car and PT. Positive values indicate Car is x times faster than PT

veh_ownership_total_motor_vehicles_per_h.label: Motorized vehicles per household
veh_ownership_total_motor_vehicles_per_h.description: Average number of motor vehicles per household

veh_ownership_pct_hh_no_vehicle.label: Households without vehicles (%)
veh_ownership_pct_hh_no_vehicle.description: Percentage of households that do not own a vehicle (motorized or bicycle)

access.label: Number of opportunities
access.description: This indicator represents the number of opportunities reachable within the time threshold defined. Values at parish and municipality level are aggregated considering a weighted mean of the number of opportunities reachable in each grid cell within that geographical unit, weighted by the population of those cells.

about.title: IMPT
about.p1: Transport poverty refers to an individual or household inability to access essential services, opportunities, and social participation due to limited, inadequate, unaffordable, unreliable or non-existent means of transport (Mejía Dorantes and Murauskaite-Bull, 2022). However, due to the lack of a universal definition and its multidimensional nature the identification and measurement of transport poverty can be challenging.
about.p2: This project aims to tackle this challenge by developing a multidimensional index that enables its measurement and monitoring over time at both national and regional levels, with the aim of identifying priority areas for intervention and supporting a just mobility transition.
about.copyright: U-Shift, CERIS, Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon

ahp.question: Which dimension is more important to you?
ahp.complete_desc: Here are your calculated dimension weights.
ahp.inconsistency_desc_force: Force Consistency is enabled. You must adjust your preferences to reach a Consistency Ratio below 0.10 before applying weights.
ahp.inconsistency_desc: Your pairwise comparisons are mathematically inconsistent. The weights will still work, but you may want to retake the survey for better accuracy.

download.title: Download Data
download.subtitle: Get the raw data for further analysis
download.description: All datasets are provided in {{format1}} for spatial analysis and {{format2}} for tabular processing. Coordinates use {{crs}}. {{attribute}} attribute should be used to relate the files.
